industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Skandia GreenPower AS
summary: Skandia GreenPower AS engages in the sale of electricity to retail customers in the Norwegian market. The company also offers solar cell solutions, as well as hardware, such as solar cell panels and solar cell roofing tiles. As of December 31, 2020, it served approximately 25,000 customers. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Kristiansand S, Norway.
